questions.name: PHQ-9 Q1 — Little interest or pleasure
questions.prompt: Little interest or pleasure in doing things

questions.name: PHQ-9 Q2 — Feeling down or depressed
PHQ-9 Q3 — Sleep trouble
questions.prompt: Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much

questions.name: PHQ-9 Q4 — Tired or low energy
questions.prompt: Feeling tired or having little energy

questions.name: PHQ-9 Q6 — Feeling bad about self
questions.prompt: Feeling bad about yourself - or that you are a failure

questions.name: PHQ-9 Q8 — Psychomotor
questions.prompt: Moving or speaking slowly, or being fidgety/restless

questions.name: PHQ-9 Q9 — Self-harm ideation
questions.prompt: Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself
